termsOfService.sections.1.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
termsOfService.sections.1.text: By accessing or using the TechByP website and services, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use our services.
termsOfService.sections.2.title: 2. Use of Services
termsOfService.sections.2.text: You may use our website and services only for lawful purposes and in accordance with these Terms. You agree not to:
termsOfService.sections.3.title: 3. Intellectual Property
termsOfService.sections.3.text: All content on our website, including text, graphics, logos, and images, is the property of TechByP and is protected by intellectual property laws. You may not use our content without our express written permission.
termsOfService.sections.4.title: 4. Product Information
termsOfService.sections.4.text: We strive to provide accurate product information, but we do not warrant that product descriptions or other content is complete, reliable, or error-free. Specifications are subject to change without notice.
termsOfService.sections.5.title: 5. Limitation of Liability
termsOfService.sections.5.text: TechByP shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages resulting from the use or inability to use our services, even if we have been advised of the possibility of such damages.
termsOfService.sections.6.title: 6. Governing Law
termsOfService.sections.6.text: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of Germany, without regard to its conflict of law provisions.
termsOfService.sections.7.title: 7. Changes to Terms
termsOfService.sections.7.text: We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. Your continued use of our services after such modifications constitutes your acceptance of the new Terms.

privacy.useOfData.title: 3. Use of Data
privacy.useOfData.text: We use the information we collect to:
privacy.dataProtection.title: 4. Data Protection
privacy.dataProtection.text: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access, alteration, or destruction.
privacy.thirdParty.title: 5. Third-Party Services
privacy.thirdParty.text: We may employ third-party companies to facilitate our services (e.g., website hosting, analytics). These third parties have access to your information only to perform specific tasks on our behalf.
privacy.cookies.title: 6. Cookies & Tracking
privacy.cookies.text: We use cookies to enhance your experience and analyze traffic. This section explains which cookies we use and how you can manage them.
privacy.cookies.manageText: You can accept cookies to improve your experience or decline them via your browser settings. Some features may not be available if you decline cookies.
privacy.rights.title: 7. Your Rights
privacy.rights.contact: To exercise these rights, please contact us at privacy@techbyp.com.
privacy.changes.title: 8. Changes to This Policy
privacy.changes.text: We may update our Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new policy on this page.

hero.home.description: What we do is rather straightforward, really. We build things properly — carefully engineered, thoughtfully designed, and tailored to suit your needs. And then, we make them even better, thanks to what you tell us. It's quality, not just from the start, but all the way through.
productShowcase.title: Our Products
productShowcase.categoryDescriptions.bes: These are the machines that practically queue up to be bought—solid, dependable, and popular for good reason.
productShowcase.categoryDescriptions.all: Everything we've got, from the big and burly to the small and satisfyingly clever.
productShowcase.categoryDescriptions.sma: The brainy side of soil sampling—automatic, precise, and remarkably well-mannered.
productShowcase.categoryDescriptions.acc: The bits that hold everything together—quiet achievers of the support world.
productShowcase.categoryDescriptions.man: Reliable, tactile tools you can trust—satisfyingly hands-on and built to last.
productShowcase.customEquipment.title: Need Custom Equipment?
productShowcase.customEquipment.descript: Our engineering team can design and manufacture specialized equipment tailored to your specific requirements.
application.heading: Built for Every Soil Mission
application.subheading: Whether it’s agricultural research or heavy construction, our tools perform with the kind of precision that would make even the strictest German engineer nod in approval.
application.applications.agriculture.des: Soil health analysis, nutrient mapping, and crop yield optimization for modern farming operations.
application.applications.geotechnicalSur: Foundation analysis, slope stability, and construction site evaluation for engineering projects.
application.applications.environmentalRe: Contamination detection, environmental monitoring, and ecological impact assessment.
application.applications.construction.de: Site preparation, material testing, and quality control for construction and infrastructure projects.
partnersHeader.title: Trusted by Leading Research & Industry Partners
partnersHeader.description: German universities and agricultural institutes rely on Bodenprobetechnik Peters for precision soil sampling technology.
testimonialsHeader.title: What Our Customers Say
testimonialsHeader.description: Professionals across agriculture, geotechnics, and environmental consulting trust TechbyP equipment.
about.introText: Every machine we build is shaped by real-world feedback from the people who use them. If something can be made stronger, smarter, or just a little easier to handle, we’re on it. That’s how we work—hands-on, detail-obsessed, and always listening.
about.ourMissionText: To provide soil sampling tools that earn the trust of agricultural experts and researchers alike—from rolling fields to white coats. Crafted with German precision and backed by support teams who actually pick up the phone, we’re dedicated to making your job easier, more accurate, and a little less complicated.
foot.footer.tagline: German-engineered gear that digs deep – literally. For soil pros who know their dirt.
foot.footer.rights: © {{year}} TechByP – Bodenprobetechnik Peters. All rights reserved.
foot.newsletter.title: Join the Club
foot.newsletter.description: Join our club. It’s like a newsletter, but with 47% more personality (and fewer bad jokes).

warning.sixteenExpress.noMountingNeeded: Oh cock! The Sixteen Express doesn't need mounting - it's perfect as it is!
warning.sixteenExpress.hasOwnMounting: Good news! The Sixteen Express comes with its own mounting solution - it's called 'being brilliant by design'
warning.sixteenExpress.noPowerpacksNeede: The Sixteen Express is like a fine wine - it doesn't need any extra power packs, it's already at full bouquet
warning.sixteenExpress.selfAcknowledging: Acknowledging what? The Sixteen Express is self-acknowledging!
warning.sixteenExpress.alreadyPerfect1: I say, the Sixteen Express is already perfect - no need to fiddle with settings!
warning.sixteenExpress.alreadyPerfect2: Why would you want to change anything? It's the Sixteen Express!
warning.sixteenExpress.alreadyPerfect3: Tinkering with perfection? How very un-Clarkson of you.
warning.sixteenExpress.alreadyPerfect4: The Sixteen Express doesn't need configuration - it needs appreciation.

vehicleMounting.title: Vehicle Mounting Type
vehicleMounting.description: Right, so how exactly do you want to attach your {{productName}}? It may seem a bit dull, but trust me—get this bit wrong, and the rest doesn't stand a chance.
configurator.productToast.desc1: Right. What you’re looking at isn’t just a button that takes you somewhere. This is the entrance to the configurator—a sophisticated mechanism designed to help you bolt together a machine that pokes the ground for a living.
configurator.productToast.desc2.part2: , decide whether it should be dragged behind a vehicle or bolted onto one, ponder the eternal question of external power, and festoon it with optional extras you’ll almost certainly insist are essential.
configurator.productToast.desc3: In essence, it’s plug-and-play meets mud and diesel. Press the button if you’re ready to begin this noble pursuit.

contact_page.title: Contact TechByP
contact_page.description: For more than 30 years, we've been the reliable sidekick to soil sampling pros — because digging around in dirt deserves top-notch gear. Got questions about our clever gadgets for environmental or geotechnical adventures? Our team's ready and waiting to talk shop, solve puzzles, or just chat about how to make your next soil sample a masterpiece.

contact_page.map.description: Our headquarters in Quakenbrück, Germany is where we design and manufacture our soil sampling equipment.
contact_page.faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
contact_page.faq.shipping.question: What are your shipping options?
contact_page.faq.shipping.answer: We ship worldwide via DHL, DPD, and other trusted carriers. Standard shipping within Germany takes 2-3 business days. International shipping times vary by destination. Expedited shipping options are available.
contact_page.faq.training.question: Do you offer training for your equipment?
contact_page.faq.training.answer: Yes, we provide comprehensive training programs for all our soil sampling equipment. Training can be conducted at your location or at our facility in Quakenbrück. Contact our sales team to arrange training sessions.
contact_page.faq.distributor.question: How can I become a distributor?
contact_page.faq.distributor.answer: We're always interested in partnering with qualified distributors worldwide. Please contact our sales department with details about your company and market experience to begin the application process.

mp1.description: Intact 0–90 cm soil cores, scientific precision, German stubbornness.
mp1.herodescription: It's not flashy. It doesn't shout. It doesn't do Wi-Fi. But what it does do—better than almost anything else—is give you a perfect, uninterrupted soil core, from surface to 90 centimetres below. Yes, the whole story, from crust to subsoil, all in one go. It's like an MRI for the earth.
mp1.detailedDescription:
Universities love this thing. And not just because it looks vaguely like a rocket launcher. It gives full visibility of the soil profile—no mixing, no layering guesswork, just a clean, vertical slice of the Earth's innards. Perfect for N-min sampling, yes, but also for those who like to actually see what's going on down there.

Now, it's hydraulically powered, semi-automatic, and very clever. It'll dig with millimetric politeness, and if it hits something unfriendly—like a rock or an old Roman coin—it simply stops. No drama. No broken bits.

And best of all: it's German engineering distilled to the essentials. Clean, efficient, utterly logical. Like Beethoven… if he were a soil sampler.
mp1.technicalSpecs.Mounting: Pickup trucks, trailers, light agricultural vehicles
mp2.description: Automatic nitrogen profiling without the faff.
mp2.herodescription: Say hello to the MP-2.60 — a wonderfully practical piece of machinery for N-min soil sampling. It goes down to 60 cm, gets what it needs, and carries on without asking for tea or praise. Designed to be reliable, not ridiculous, it's ideal for anyone who likes things to work properly the first time.
mp2.detailedDescription:
In a world of overcomplication, the MP-2.60 is refreshingly straightforward. It's built specifically for automatic nitrogen profiling—none of that faffing about with manual augers or guesswork. It uses a high-frequency hydraulic hammer to punch through soil like a gentle jackhammer, then quietly rotates and lifts the rod before politely dropping the sample into its container.

It has smart internal logic to decide which bits of soil to keep, and if you fancy it, you can even enable layer separation for horizon-specific sampling. The samples themselves land in waterproof containers, and the whole unit mounts comfortably on trailers, pickups, or basically anything that rolls and doesn't fall apart.

And should your research ambitions outgrow its 60 cm limit, don't panic — the MP-2.60 is fully upgradeable to the MP-3.90 or MP-4.100.
mp2.technicalSpecs.Mounting Options: Pickup, trailer, or anything vaguely roadworthy
mp2.technicalSpecs.Special Features: Obstacle detection, Waterproof containers, Digital keyboard
mp3.description: Tough enough to handle the soil, smart enough to work efficiently.
mp3.herodescription: The MP-3.90 is what happens when you take German thinking, sprinkle in some overengineering, and then ask it to dig holes for science. Designed to extract soil samples down to 95 cm without so much as a grunt from the operator, it can do 3-layer separation, auto-discharge, and decide (all on its own) when to give up if the soil fights back.
mp3.detailedDescription:
Now, precision and efficiency aren't just buzzwords here—they're thoughtfully built in, so you can concentrate on the data rather than wrestling with stubborn dirt. It manages tough soil with barely any fuss from the operator, making it a rather dependable companion for serious scientific work or proper field research.

It'll slot neatly onto pickups, trailers, tractors, or just about anything vaguely roadworthy, with customisable depth and horizon settings to suit whatever you need. Plus, your samples end up safe and sound in waterproof containers, which is a nice touch.

And here's the kicker—it's built for proper, professional use, not some weekend warrior's toy. Solid, reliable, and quietly competent—exactly what you'd expect from German engineering, really.
mp3.technicalSpecs.Special Features: Obstacle detection, Waterproof containers, Digital keyboard
mp4.description: Deep soil, sorted smartly. No fuss, just depth.
mp4.herodescription: This is the MP-4.100 — imagine if a hydraulic hammer and a PhD in soil science had a child. It's a fully automatic sampler that goes down a full 100 cm, pulls out up to four layers, and sorts them like a butler with a geological hobby. It's what you'd get if you asked Germany to make a mole.
mp4.technicalSpecs.Special Features: Obstacle detection, Waterproof containers, Digital keyboard
dh.description: Efficient, dependable, and quietly confident. Soil sampling, but with a bit of hydraulic muscle behind it.
dh.herodescription: The DH-1.30 is a robust, hydraulic soil sampler built to perform with quiet confidence and steady power—no overcomplication, just solid results. Drilling smoothly up to 30 centimetres, it's powered by a hydraulic engine—so you get plenty of grunt, no electrics needed. A little louder than its electric cousin, sure, but it's no show-off. Just reliable, solid work, day in, day out.
dh.detailedDescription:
The DH-1.30 takes the sensible design of its electric sibling but swaps out the battery for a hydraulic engine — ideal if you've got access to hydraulic power and want a bit more torque.

Depth control is sharp and precise, with millimetre adjustments to handle uneven ground as if it's nothing.

Operation is delightfully straightforward: one button, two preset depths — because life's too short for fiddly controls.

It weighs a sturdy 43 kg, built tough enough to handle real fieldwork but light enough that you won't need a forklift or a strongman to move it.

Easily mounted on quads, trailers, pickups, or light-duty vehicles, this thing is made for versatility.

For those who prefer the classic reliability of hydraulic power with dependable German engineering, this sampler is the sensible choice.
dh.technicalSpecs.Mounting Options: Quad, pickup, trailer, or light-duty vehicle
de.description: Smart, silent, and very nimble. Making soil sampling look almost effortless.
de.herodescription: The DE-1.30 is the sensible, compact soil sampler that quietly gets on with the job—drilling down up to 30 centimetres without making a fuss or needing you to chain-smoke while it works. It's electric, so no fumes, no noise, just clean, reliable soil sampling.
de.technicalSpecs.Mounting Options: Quads, pickup, trailer, or light-duty vehicle
boprob.description: Tow it, sample it, then keep on moving—no fuss, no waiting.
boprob.herodescription: This is the BOPROB III—also known, rather jauntily, as the The Sixteen Express. It's a trailer that takes soil samples while you drive. Yes, really. No stopping, no button-mashing, no shouting at interns. Just tow it behind something with wheels and let it get on with the job.
boprob.detailedDescription:
Now, the The Sixteen Express is what you'd call a clever bit of kit. It's a tow-behind soil sampler designed to do its work while you keep moving. Which, frankly, is how everything should work—but doesn't.

Sampling happens at a rather brisk pace thanks to a rotating crank that goes the full 360°, stabbing into the ground like a polite little jackhammer, then politely ejecting the core into the sample magazine.

Everything is watched over by a 7-inch touchscreen—lovely bit of kit—so you know exactly what it's doing at any time. There's even an optional camera, in case you want to see it work, or just admire your purchase.

The wheels are large and soft—235/60 R16, if you're into that sort of thing—which means minimal ground pressure and no getting bogged down in a muddy field, unless you've really tried.

It hitches easily to tractors, pickups, quads—or anything else with a tow hitch, really. No fiddling, no adapters, no workshop heroics required. And once you're done, it unhitches just as easily.

If you're driving too fast—or too slowly, perhaps because you're admiring the scenery—the system simply refuses to sample. Which is brilliant, because it means the machine is smarter than the average driver.
boprob.technicalSpecs.Mounting Options: Tow-behind trailer (fits tractors or any vehicle with standard hitch)
laydown.name: Lay-down Frame
laydown.description: A no‑nonsense mounting bracket for your sampler—fits the back end of most civilized vehicles without turning them into Franken-trucks.
laydown.herodescription: Brilliantly sensible. This lay-down frame, TÜV-certified Mount Kit bolts to your tow hitch like it belongs there. Supports our MP, DH, and DE series samplers.
laydown.detailedDescription:
Mounted on the truck bed connected to that place where your tow bar lives—just below the boot lid and above the exhaust pipe drama—this frame lets you carry a full soil sampler with elegance. Fold it down to operate, fold it up to drive off to dinner. It's sturdy, tested, and painted like a German tool cabinet.

Clients can choose their level of involvement: some prefer to install the frame themselves with the help of our foolproof instructions; others drop by with their vehicle and let us handle the mounting and hydraulic wizardry; and for those who enjoy instant gratification, we also offer fully kitted-out field rigs—pre-mounted, tested, and generally quite smug about it.
laydown.technicalSpecs.Material: EN S355 steel, 4 mm thick, RAL 9005 powder-coat
laydown.technicalSpecs.Mount Interface: 50 mm ISO tow hitch + DE‑1.30 13‑pin plug
laydown.technicalSpecs.Hydraulic Input: 135–220 bar; 20–90 L/min; DN 19/¾″ hose, burst ≥500 bar
laydown.technicalSpecs.Power Options: External hydraulic power pack or battery
laydown.technicalSpecs.Included Hardware: M16×45‑8.8 + self‑locking M10 bolts, all plated
laydown.technicalSpecs.Bracket Compatibi: All MP (MP‑1.90 to MP‑4.100), DH, and DE models
tph.name: Three‑Point Hitch
tph.description: Makes your tractor be a soil-sampling beast, harnessing PTO power for hydraulic sampler integration. Tough, reliable, no-nonsense.
tph.herodescription: Tractor 3‑Point Hitch Frame: The heavyweight champion for Cat‑1/2 tractors, designed to mount your hydraulic soil sampler straight onto the tractor's PTO system with a hydraulic pump platform to match.
tph.detailedDescription:
Imagine the steel backbone your tractor never knew it needed. Crafted from thick A‑frame steel and cloaked in black epoxy armor, this mount bolts cleanly onto your tractor's lift arms. It's built to survive farm life — rain, mud, and the odd tractor tantrum included. The kit comes with lift bars and all mounting bolts, so no improvising with rusty nails or duct tape.

Suitable for compact tractors with lift arm spacing around 50 to 60 inches, this frame supports the hydraulic pump directly powered by your PTO shaft, giving you efficient hydraulic flow for smooth soil sampling. It's the upgrade that makes your tractor feel like it's ready to take on the field Olympics.
tph.technicalSpecs.Construction: Welded heavy-duty A‑frame steel with epoxy finish
tph.technicalSpecs.PTO Compatibility: Standard tractor PTO drives hydraulic pump
tph.technicalSpecs.Includes: Lift bars, mounting bolts, and installation hardware
tph.technicalSpecs.Frame Size: Fits 50–60" lift arm spacing typical of compact tractors
tph.technicalSpecs.Compatibility: Works with all MP-series, DH, and DE soil sampling machines
fc.name: Full Conversion
fc.description: Turns your utility vehicle or pickup into a no-nonsense soil sampling beast. Bed off, frame on, tools loaded.
fc.herodescription: Full Conversion Kit replaces the standard truck bed or UTV platform with a custom steel frame and aluminium covers—purpose-built for soil sampling with MP-series, DH, and DE machines. TÜV-approved, road-legal, and rather clever.
fc.detailedDescription:
If your UTV or pickup dreams of greatness, this is its moment. We carefully remove the stock bed and replace them with a steel conversion frame, wrapped in aluminium panels that scream 'professional operator' louder than a flat-out Hilux on gravel.

It gives you proper mounting for all our machines, integrated storage for coolers, tools, lighting—basically everything but the packed lunch. Certified by TÜV, built for serious campaigns, and oddly satisfying to look at.
fc.technicalSpecs.Compatible Vehicles: Pickups (Hilux, Ranger, etc.) and UTVs (Gator,RTV, Ranger, etc.)
fc.technicalSpecs.Vehicle Requirements: Standard hitch receiver or trailer coupling. Of course.
trailer.name: Special Trailers
trailer.description: These trailers transport MP-series, DH/DE systems effortlessly across anything that isn't actually a wall.
trailer.herodescription:
Special Trailers – Field Haulers are rugged, hot-dip galvanised trailers with both braked and non-braked options, designed to carry your soil sampling kit—be it MP, DH, or DE—through fields and farms with Germanic precision.
They come with clever storage for tools, lights, and coolers—so you can work all day without the usual fuss.
trailer.detailedDescription:
With a fixed 1.35 m track width and jack-castor wheels, the Field Hauler maneuvers like a sensible shopping trolley—only with more steel and fewer weak points.

Choose braked models for heavier loads or steeper inclines—up to 3,500 kg GTW—so you can haul soil samplers without dreaming of new brake pads every trip.
trailer.technicalSpecs.Load Options: 550 kg (braked/non-braked), heavy‑duty upgrade to 1,500 kg GTW
trailer.technicalSpecs.Rims/Tyre Size: LT285/75 R16 on aluminium rims or MT215/75 R15
trailer.technicalSpecs.Brakes: Mechanical drum brakes (braked version), single-axle configuration
powerpack.name: Power Pack
powerpack.description: For those running MP or DH units without onboard power, these packs deliver consistent hydraulic or electric energy wherever your work takes you.
powerpack.herodescription:
Power Packs are like the dependable butlers of soil sampling—offering reliable, portable power so your machines don't throw a tantrum. Whether you fancy the classic hydraulic grunt or prefer the whisper-quiet electric charm, these packs have your back.
Wrapped in a rugged steel casing tougher than your average tractor, with sensible perks like LCD battery status and filtration systems, they're the trusty sidekick you never knew you needed out in the field.
powerpack.detailedDescription:
The hydraulic model, perfectly matched to MP-series and DH-series machines, boasts a 13 HP gasoline engine and a 22 L oil tank, pushing out 135 bar pressure at 20 L/min—that's serious grunt for when you want to feel like a proper mechanical overlord.

The electric cousin, designed specifically for the DE-series, sports a 24 V / 100 Ah battery, a stainless steel suit of armour, and an LCD screen to keep an eye on its own power levels. Ideal for those who prefer a quieter, cleaner, and frankly more polite approach to soil sampling.

Both models are portable, ruggedly built, and come with return/suction filtration to keep your precious hydraulics from choking on dirt—because nobody likes premature wear, do they?
powerpack.technicalSpecs.Hydraulic Model: 13 HP gasoline engine, 22 L oil tank, 135 bar pressure, 20 L/min flow, 12 V electrical system
powerpack.technicalSpecs.Electric Model: 24 V / 100 Ah battery, LCD status display, stainless steel enclosure
spareparts.name: Recommended Spare Parts
spareparts.description: Because nothing ruins a good day in the field like a broken fitting or a leaky seal. These are the official, recommended spare parts—hand-picked for your MP, DH, DE or BOPROB III machine, and ready to get you out of trouble before it starts.
spareparts.herodescription:
Think of these as the first-aid kit for your soil sampler. Whether you're out in a bog in Bavaria or a dust bowl in Bulgaria, having the right OEM spare parts on hand turns a potential disaster into a smugly handled hiccup.
Each kit includes the usual suspects—O-rings, hydraulic couplings, filters, belts, and the bits that quietly work the hardest. No improvising with baling wire or borrowed parts from your mate's combine.
spareparts.detailedDescription:
These are the recommended spare parts kits for the MP-series, DH-series, DE-series, and BOPROB III samplers. And no, they're not optional. They're what the engineers use. What the service techs use. What you should have in the toolbox if you're even slightly serious about uptime.

Inside each kit, you'll find the usual suspects—seals, filters, hydraulic fittings, relays, and pressure lines—the bits that keep the fluid where it's supposed to be and the current flowing in the right direction. It's like carrying a spare pair of underpants on a long-haul flight: you hope you won't need them, but you'll be damn glad if you do.

Parts are individually packaged and labelled, so you don't spend half a day figuring out if that washer fits the return line or the oil filter. And of course, they're all factory-certified and designed to slot right in without any butchery.
spareparts.technicalSpecs.Compatibility: MP-1.90, MP-2.60, MP-3.90, MP-4.100, MP-1.120, DH-series, DE-1.30, BOPROB III
spareparts.technicalSpecs.Included Parts: Hydraulic couplings, filters, O-rings, solenoids, belts, relays, pressure lines (varies by kit)
coolbox.name: Coolbox 95L
coolbox.description: Because sometimes your samples—or your beer—deserve better than lukewarm misery. With this 95L beast, you're bringing a portable arctic tundra to the job site. Possibly overkill. But definitely brilliant.
coolbox.herodescription:
You know the feeling—you're halfway up a mountain, everything's on schedule, and then someone opens the cooler to find... soup. Not anymore. The Chiller turns smug grins into icy relief, literally.
It cools. It freezes. It glows. And yes, it has an app—because your phone isn't smug enough already. German engineers might call this a Kühlbox. We call it 'bringing the fridge, because we can.'
coolbox.detailedDescription:
The Coolbox 95L is, frankly, more capable than most hotel minibars. Dual compartments, each configurable as fridge or freezer, mean you can keep your sample kit on one side and lunch on the other—and still have room for smug satisfaction.

It's powered by a high-efficiency LG compressor (which is more than your car's AC can say), and chills down to -20°C even when it's hot enough to fry an egg on the roof rack. Use it via the control panel or the Alpicool app if you're the sort of person who controls their fridge from a hammock.

For extended autonomy, pair it with the optional battery (not included), giving you 4 to 24 hours of standalone cooling. Or plug it into the vehicle and never worry again. It's built to take a beating—though we advise against that, obviously.
led.name: LED Work Light 1700
led.description: Darkness is no excuse. With 1700 lumens packed into a compact, armored unit, this LED work light is what happens when you cross a headlamp with a small sun. Whether you're mid-sample or mid-swear word, you'll see everything—clearly.
led.herodescription:
Sampling in the dark? Forgot the sun? No problem. The Midnight Sun delivers seriously powerful illumination without the heat, the noise, or the diesel bill.
Mount it, point it, fire it up—then wonder how you ever lived without it. It's not romantic lighting. It's get-the-job-done lighting.
led.detailedDescription:
The LED Work Light 1700 is a field-tested, no-nonsense luminaire designed to cut through darkness like a chainsaw through butter. With a brutal 1700 lumen output, it delivers focused near-field lighting for sampling rigs, machinery, or any situation where 'I think I see something' isn't good enough.

Built with a black anodized aluminum housing and meeting IP6K7 and IP6K9K standards, this unit shrugs off water jets, dust storms, and probably most of your mistakes. A pivoting bracket allows precise aiming, while the patterned lens keeps the beam wide and usable.

Compatible with 12–24 V DC systems, the light draws 24 W and comes with open cable ends for easy integration. Assembly by qualified personnel is required—because melting wires is less funny in real life.
camera.name: External Camera
camera.description: Why guess what's going on behind the rig when you can watch it happen in real time. The Watchtower mounts to your machine and streams live footage straight to your cab. No cables. No blind spots. No surprises.
camera.herodescription:
Ever tried reversing your rig blind with a 3-ton sampler on the back? Not ideal. The Watchtower gives you eyes on the drill—from the comfort of your driver's seat. Monitor every move, strike, and wobble.
Connect via 4G. View from your phone. Because being in two places at once is now technically possible.
camera.detailedDescription:
The Watchtower is a field-ready 5MP camera built for mounting directly to your soil sampling machine. Once installed, it streams live video to your tablet or phone using 4G—so you can see what's happening at the back of the rig without leaving your seat (or shouting across a muddy field).

Its 75° viewing angle gives full visibility of the sampling head, while infrared night vision extends that confidence well into the dusk. Whether you're checking alignment, confirming core drop, or just admiring your drilling skills, it's all visible in real time.

The app is free, the setup takes minutes, and there's no need for local Wi-Fi. With an optional micro SD card (up to 128 GB), you can even record operations for documentation or training. Setup is plug-and-play, with one important caveat: insert the SIM card properly or spend the afternoon diagnosing your own impatience.

It's rainproof, mud-proof, and stubbornly reliable—exactly what you want from something bolted to a vibrating machine in the middle of nowhere.
probes.name: Probes, Dipsticks and Accessories
probes.description: The gold standard for manual N-min sampling—precision-engineered, tapered drill rods built for hard soils and lab-grade accuracy.
probes.herodescription: Not just any rods—these are razor-sharp, tool steel scalpels for the soil aficionado who demands precision. Their tapered design means less fuss, less friction, and those laser-etched 10 cm marks? Perfect for knowing exactly how deep you've poked—because soil layers don't like to be disturbed, and neither should you.
probes.detailedDescription:
Designed for those who take soil seriously (and themselves, a little less): three slick tapered sizes—40→38 mm for 0-30 cm, 35→33 mm for 30-60 cm, and 30→28 mm for 60-90 cm—cut through stubborn clay and gravel like a hot knife through butter, thanks to pre-broken edges ready to do the hard work for you.

Each rod sports laser-etched 10 cm increments that won't fade faster than your enthusiasm on a Monday morning. Pair them with toggles (Items 1030/1031) for easy lifting, and a chisel (Item 1051) to strip samples clean—because sampling should feel like a gentle nudge, not an arm wrestle.
probes.technicalSpecs.Weight: Approx. 2.1 kg per meter (40 mm diameter rod)
drillrods.name: Drill Rods Ø22 mm for Normal Soil Profiles
drillrods.description: Robust drill rods (Ø 22 mm) designed to open normal soil profiles up to 10 m depth with modular, interchangeable parts for flexible length adjustment.
drillrods.herodescription: Meet the modular drill rods with a neat 22 mm drilling groove, built to tackle soil profiles up to a serious 10 meters deep. Thanks to connecting bolts, you can adjust the length faster than you can say 'Bob's your uncle,' and the striking heads handle everything—from the casual tap to the full machine punch.
drillrods.detailedDescription:
Each section is a solid 1000 mm of engineering precision, sporting a 12 mm groove to keep your soil samples firmly in place while you pull them up from the depths. Extensions screw on easily with 5/8” internal threads—because sometimes, more is just more.

Tighten with special SW 18 wrenches—no slipping, no drama. For the grand finale, pick your weapon: a jack lifter with clamping chain or a one-arm puller with a ball clamp, both designed to get the job done safely and without breaking a sweat.
drillrods.technicalSpecs.Lifting devices: Jack with lifting bar and clamping chain, one-arm puller with integrated ball clamp
hammers.name: Hammer Selection & Accessories
hammers.nickname: The Right Hammer for Every Job
hammers.description: Every hammer's a hero in its own right. Pick the one that fits your soil-sampling saga and don't forget the trusty sidekicks—our accessories.
hammers.herodescription: From the solid, no-nonsense square hammer to the gentle touch of a nylon soft-face, we've got the tools to make your soil sampling less grunt, more finesse. Choose wisely—precision, power, and comfort await.
hammers.detailedDescription:
Need to channel your inner Thor with a hefty 4.3 kg square hammer boasting a 135x135 mm impact surface? Or perhaps a featherlight nylon soft-face hammer to coax the soil with subtlety? Either way, your wish is our command.

Fancy a bit of DIY flair? Swap heads like a chef changes knives, pick from wooden or hickory handles of all lengths, and top it off with inserts as tough or gentle as you like. It's like a bespoke suit—only for your hammer.
hammers.technicalSpecs.Square hammer: Impact surface 135x135 mm, head length 200 mm, weight 4.3 kg
hammers.technicalSpecs.Round plastic ham: Impact surface 150 mm Ø, head length 200 mm, weight 4.3 kg
hammers.technicalSpecs.Soft-face hammer: Impact surface 80-125 mm Ø, wooden handle, weight 2.9 - 6.7 kg
hammers.technicalSpecs.Nylon soft-face h: Impact surface 80 mm Ø, wooden handle, weight 3.0 - 3.2 kg
hammers.technicalSpecs.Handles: Wooden and hickory, lengths 395 mm to 900 mm
hammers.technicalSpecs.Screws: Allen screw with nut for soft-face hammer sizes 80 and 100 mm Ø
goettingerDrills.name: Göttinger Soil Corers
goettingerDrills.description: Who needs a gym membership when you have the Göttinger Soil Corers? One person, a light 2.5 kg tool, and you’re ready to conquer the soil—without leaving a trace on the field or terrorizing any buried cables.
goettingerDrills.herodescription: From the delicate clay to lightly compacted sand, these corers slice through with minimal fuss. Three perfectly calibrated drill layers, cushioned handles, and a clever fräs profile make sampling feel less like work and more like wizardry.
goettingerDrills.detailedDescription:
Single-handed operation, no heavy machinery, no extra helpers, just you and the earth. The Göttinger drills separate three soil layers with precision, giving you reliable N-min samples weighing 500–1000g from 16 parallel strikes per depth section.

Caution: these are champions of gentle soils. Rocky, bone-dry, or tightly packed sand might push their patience. But in ideal conditions, it’s as close as you’ll get to a soil-sampling magic wand.
goettingerDrills.technicalSpecs.Complete: Includes one corer for each depth section (0-30 cm, 30-60 cm, 60-90 cm)
raupe.description: Rough terrain? Slope? Cornfield maze? No problem. This crawler doesn’t complain—it just samples.
raupe.herodescription: The Nitratraupe is the sort of machine any soil enthusiast would nod at approvingly. Capable of 0–90 cm soil sampling across three layers, it navigates rough terrain like a polite but relentless toddler on tracks. Semi-automatic, hydraulically assisted, and guided by your eyes (because the machine respects your intelligence).
raupe.detailedDescription:
Precision meets brute force in a surprisingly courteous package. The Nitratraupe cuts a clean soil profile without mixing layers (no rotary drills required). Three layers—0–30, 30–60, 60–90 cm are extracted with finesse.

It runs off the carrier vehicle's engine, so no extra combustion motor tantrums. Manual sampling lets you visually inspect the core, keeping costs and headaches low.

Tracks make it narrow enough to squeeze between growing corn, and with a remote control, you can raise, lower, spin, and sample without leaving your comfort zone. A true gentleman’s soil-sampling crawler.
raupe.technicalSpecs.Remote Control: Full operation of crawler and sampling unit
